## react-utilities package

Universe Design React Utilities

## Classes


<SiteTableHighlight columns="3" type="1" />

|  Class | Description |
|  --- | --- |
|  DescendantsManager | Class to manage descendants and their relative indices in the DOM. It uses <code>node.compareDocumentPosition(...)</code> under the hood |
|  DomainEvent | This is an abstract class of a domain event. |
|  DomainEventTarget | <code>DomainEventTarget</code> class is similar with DOM EventTarget API which contains a callbacks map and some functions to add listeners and invoke listeners. |
|  FindDOMNode | 用于获取子组件的 dom ref |

|  Enumeration | Description |
|  --- | --- |
|  KeyboardKey | https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/KeyboardEvent/key/Key\_Values |

## Functions


<SiteTableHighlight columns="3" type="1" />

|  Function | Description |
|  --- | --- |
|  compatibleDevWarning(component, propNames) | 格式化出一个 AntD 兼容性开发警告 |
|  composeRefs(refs) | 组合多个 ref |
|  createDescendantContext() | Create a generic typed descendant context |
|  createDescendantContextOptional() | Create a generic typed descendant context |
|  createInOutTransition(config) |  |
|  deprecatedWarning(component, propName, replacePropName) | 格式化出一个即将废弃警告 |
|  devWarning(component, message) | 格式化出一个 UD 开发警告 |
|  DomainEventHandler({ type, handler, }) | <code>DomainEventHandler</code> is a component without a user interface, utilized for managing event dispatching. |
|  DomainEventTargetProvider({ children }) | <code>DomainEventTargetProvider</code> will create a <code>DomainEventTarget</code> instance and provide it using react context provider. |
|  forwardRef(render) |  |
|  getSize(target, entry) | 通过 element 或 resize observer entry 获取节点的尺寸信息。该函数内部处理了兼容性问题，包括浏览器差异、节点差异等。 |
|  getSizeAbbr(sizeName) |  |
|  isClient() | 判断是否为客户端环境 |
|  isElement(el) |  |
|  isFunction(x) |  |
|  isHTMLElement(el) |  |
|  isSVGElement(el) |  |
|  resetWarned() | 重置警告 map。重置后可以打印之前打印过的警告。 |
|  sleep(timeout) | 睡眠函数 |
|  StyleSheetOnce({ styles }) |  |
|  supportRef(node) | 判断是否支持 ref |
|  updateRef(ref, instance) | 更新 ref 的值 |
|  use(promise) | React.use polyfill |
|  useCheckbox(props, inputRef) | checkbox 组件的 hook |
|  useCloneElementRef({ children, ref, }, { skipped, domOnly, }) | 给 child node clone ref |
|  useConstant(fn) | The <code>useConstant</code> function is a custom React Hook that allows you to store a constant value that persists for the lifetime of the component. This is useful when you need a constant value that does not change across re-renders, but is not part of the component's state or props. |
|  useControlledState(defaultValue, controlledValue, option) |  |
|  useDomainEventTargetContext() | <code>useDomainEventTargetContext</code> is a hook to get the nearest parent event target. You can dispatch events using the event target returned. |
|  useEffectOnce(effect) | 只执行一次的 effect。在 concurrent mode 中会执行两次。 |
|  useEventCallback(fn) | For event callback, 利用最新值模式，在并发场景下有可能有问题 |
|  useForceUpdate() | The <code>useForceUpdate</code> function is a custom React Hook that forces a component to re-render. This is useful in situations where you need to force a re-render for reasons other than state or prop changes, such as responding to global state changes or events. |
|  useLatest(value) | 获取最新值 这个 hook 一般用于在 effect 中获取 state 的最新值，返回的 ref 引用不变，不会造成 effect 重新执行 |
|  useLatestState(initialState) | 适用于一些需要获取即时数据，但是该数据由和视图有关 |
|  useLogger(componentName, rest) | The <code>useLogger</code> function is a custom React Hook that is for debugging |
|  useMergedRefs(refs) | 合并多个 ref。注意这里传入的 refs 会作为 useMemo 的 deps，数量不能随 render 变化。 |
|  usePrevious(state) |  |
|  useProxyRef(initialValue, callback) | Get notification when a react node ref value is changed wherever the node is. It is very helpful when you want to get a child node ref value from a parent node. |
|  useResizeObserver(callback, { disabled, }) | A React hook that fires a callback whenever ResizeObserver detects a change to its size https://github.com/jaredLunde/react-hook/tree/master/packages/resize-observer\#readme |
|  useStyleSheetOnce(styles, { disabled, atLeastOne }) | useStyleSheetOnce 全局插入一次 css 样式，适用于静态样式场景 |
|  useWillUnmount(callback) | The <code>useWillUnmount</code> function is a custom React Hook that executes a callback function when a component is about to unmount. This is useful for cleanup purposes, such as cancelling API requests, removing event listeners, or invalidating timers. |
|  warn(valid, message, args) | 打印一个警告。这个方法不会去重，只是单纯打印一个警告。 |
|  warning(valid, message, args) | 打印一个一次性警告。这个函数命名为 warning 可以配合 <code>babel-plugin-dev-expression</code> 插件进行转码加上 NODE\_ENV 限制，最终 production 代码中没有任何的 warning 调用。 |
